rules.name: stale-long-term
rules.message: Long-term memories are stale (avg actuality {avg} in {tier} tier). Consider running reflexion.

rules.name: low-coverage-operational
rules.message: Low coverage: only {count}/{threshold} memories in {tier} tier. Consider storing more operational knowledge.

rules.name: recurring-bugs
rules.message: Recurring pattern detected: {count} memories share common keywords. Consider consolidation.
